title: C93 — Content-addressed liveness leak: a live content-address is an existence claim about its co…

story.text:
# C93
**Content-addressed liveness leak: a live content-address is an existence claim about its content; deduplication/GUID liveness leaks existence, and existence bounds the search. The address does not leak content; its liveness leaks existence.**

*Confidence:* ~55% · *Status:* active · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 · conjectural · *Register:* core
*Home:* limitative-theorems-and-privacy-is-value.md §3.5, §3.6

Band IX · The Limitative Reading · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 (Gate G6)

story.title: Tome IX Act 05 — The Name That Climbs Out
story.text: a tome act that cites this conjecture.
